testcase.name: test_customer_login
test_admin_login
test_authenticated_bid

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 400] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:176: in test_authenticated_bid assert bid_response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {bid_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [200, 400] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_achievements
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:188: in test_user_achievements assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_set_aotd
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:205: in test_admin_set_aotd assert set_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_active_auctions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:237: in test_get_active_auctions assert auction.get('status') == 'active' E AssertionError: assert 'ended' == 'active' E E - active E + ended
